metadata.name: phoenix_eternal
metadata.description: Phoenix Eternal: a perpetual futures exchange

docs: Anchor-compatible IDL for the Phoenix Eternal program.
This IDL is maintained from the native Rust program surface and includes explicit instruction, account, and event discriminators for transaction and account decoding.
PDA metadata is included where the program defines a canonical derivation; accounts without PDA metadata are supplied as explicit accounts or are stored in GlobalConfiguration.

docs: Spline collection account holding the trader spline.

accounts.name: GlobalConfiguration
docs: Global exchange configuration account derived from the "global" PDA seed.
Stores configured authorities, canonical collateral mint, global vault, PerpAssetMap, GlobalTraderIndex, ActiveTraderBuffer, and WithdrawQueue addresses.

accounts.name: OrderbookHeader
docs: Market orderbook account header for a perpetual market.
Market orderbooks are explicit market accounts created during AddMarket and recorded in PerpAssetMap metadata; they are not PDAs.

accounts.name: SplineCollectionHeader
docs: Spline collection account header derived from ["spline", orderbook].
Stores spline market-making state for one market.

accounts.name: Trader
docs: Trader account derived from ["trader", authority, trader_pda_index, trader_subaccount_index].
Stores collateral, positions, open orders, and per-trader risk state.

accounts.name: ActiveTraderBufferHeader
docs: Header arena for the active trader buffer derived from ["active_trader_buffer", 0u16].

accounts.name: ActiveTraderBufferArenaHeader
docs: Additional active trader buffer arena derived from ["active_trader_buffer", arena_index].

accounts.name: GlobalTraderIndexHeader
docs: Header arena for the global trader index derived from ["global_trader_index", 0u16].

accounts.name: GlobalTraderIndexArenaHeader
docs: Additional global trader index arena derived from ["global_trader_index", arena_index].

accounts.name: PerpAssetMap
docs: Perpetual asset map account storing market metadata, risk parameters, oracle metadata, and funding state.
The account pubkey is stored in GlobalConfiguration rather than derived from a fixed PDA seed; it is not a PDA.

accounts.name: WithdrawQueueHeader
docs: Withdraw queue account storing pending withdrawals and withdrawal throttle state.
The account pubkey is stored in GlobalConfiguration rather than derived from a fixed PDA seed; it is not a PDA.

accounts.name: PermissionAccount
docs: Permission delegation account derived from ["permission", authority, user].
Stores delegated capability bits and optional expiry/usage constraints.

accounts.name: StopLosses
docs: Stop-loss account derived from ["stoploss", trader_account, asset_id].
Stores trigger orders for one trader and market.

accounts.name: EscrowHeader
docs: Escrow inbox account derived from ["escrow", authority].
Stores pending escrow requests for the authority.

accounts.name: ConditionalOrderHeader
docs: Conditional orders account derived from ["conditional_orders", trader_account].
Stores attached and position-scoped conditional orders for a trader account.

types.name: OrderPacket
docs: Serialized parameters for Phoenix order placement instructions.

types.name: OrderPacketKind
docs: Supported order variants accepted by the Phoenix matching engine.

types.name: Side
docs: Trading direction for an order.

types.name: SelfTradeBehavior
docs: Policy for handling matches against the submitting trader's resting orders.

types.name: BaseLots
docs: Quantity wrapper representing discrete base lots.

types.name: QuoteLots
docs: Quantity wrapper representing discrete quote lots.

types.name: Ticks
docs: Discrete price unit measured in quote lots per base lot.

types.name: BaseLotsPerTick
docs: Density of liquidity per tick for spline market making.

types.name: OrderFlags
docs: Bitmask flags applied to an order (currently only the reduce-only bit is used).

types.name: OrderIds
docs: Collection of cancel identifiers used to target specific resting orders.

types.name: CancelUpToInstruction
docs: Parameters controlling cancel-up-to behaviour.

types.name: CancelId
docs: Identifies a resting order along with an optional hint into the orderbook.

types.name: FIFOOrderId
docs: Stable identifier for a resting order composed of price ticks and sequence number.

types.name: NodePointer
docs: Pointer hint into the orderbook linked list; zero represents a null pointer.

types.name: Symbol
docs: Fixed-width (16 byte) asset symbol stored as UTF-8 with trailing zero padding.

types.name: Price
docs: Price representation composed of a mantissa (`value`) and decimal exponent (`expo`).

types.name: OraclePriceUpdate
docs: Single oracle price update targeting a specific perpetual asset.

types.name: UpdateOraclePricesWithOrderingInstruction
docs: Oracle instruction payload containing ordered price updates and timestamp reset policy.

types.name: UpdateSplinePriceParams
docs: Parameters for updating a spline's mid-price.

types.name: UpdateSplinePriceParamsWithOrdering
docs: Parameters for updating a spline's mid-price with anti-reordering protection.

types.name: DepositFundsInstruction
docs: Parameters for depositing collateral into the global vault.

types.name: RegisterTraderParams
docs: Parameters for registering a new trader account.

types.name: LiquidationParams
docs: Parameters for liquidating a trader's position via market order.

types.name: TransferRequest
docs: Transfer payload describing how many base lots of an asset should move from the liquidatee to the liquidator.

types.name: LiquidationTransferParams
docs: Parameters controlling liquidation transfers between traders.

types.name: ClosePositionsParams
docs: Parameters for closing matched positions between at-loss and in-profit traders.

types.name: MultipleOrderPacket
docs: Batch order packet for placing multiple post-only limit orders in a single transaction.

types.name: CondensedOrder
docs: Condensed order representation for batch order placement (price, size, and optional TiF).

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount in quote lots to withdraw.

fields.name: logBatchIndex
docs: Index of this log batch for tracking event sequences.

fields.name: totalEvents
docs: Number of events serialized in this log batch.

types.name: OrderbookHeader
docs: Fixed metadata prefix for a Phoenix Eternal orderbook account.
The large recent-trade buffer and dynamic orderbook bytes follow this prefix and are left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: SplineCollectionHeader
docs: Fixed SplineCollectionHeader prefix for a Phoenix Eternal spline collection account.
Dynamic spline map bytes follow this header and are left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: TraderState
docs: Fixed trader state embedded in the Phoenix Eternal DynamicTraderHeader.

types.name: Trader
docs: Fixed DynamicTraderHeader prefix for a Phoenix Eternal trader account.
Dynamic position map bytes follow this header and are left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: ActiveTraderBufferHeader
docs: Discriminator-only account definition for viewer compatibility.
The full active trader buffer layout is not modeled in this IDL.

types.name: ActiveTraderBufferArenaHeader
docs: Discriminator-only account definition for viewer compatibility.
The full active trader buffer arena layout is not modeled in this IDL.

types.name: GlobalTraderIndexHeader
docs: Discriminator-only account definition for viewer compatibility.
The full global trader index layout is not modeled in this IDL.

types.name: GlobalTraderIndexArenaHeader
docs: Discriminator-only account definition for viewer compatibility.
The full global trader index arena layout is not modeled in this IDL.

types.name: SequenceNumber
docs: Pair of sequence number and last update slot.

types.name: PerpAssetMetadata
docs: Opaque fixed-size zero-copy PerpAssetMetadata payload stored inside PerpAssetMap.

types.name: PerpAssetMapEntry
docs: One fixed slot in the PerpAssetMap ShortMapV2 backing array.

types.name: PerpAssetMetadataShortMapV2
docs: Zero-copy ShortMapV2<Symbol, PerpAssetMetadata, 1024> layout.

types.name: PerpAssetMap
docs: Canonical Eternal perpetual asset map account.

types.name: WithdrawThrottle
docs: Fixed WithdrawThrottle payload embedded in WithdrawQueueHeader.

types.name: WithdrawQueueHeader
docs: Fixed WithdrawQueueHeader prefix for the Phoenix Eternal withdraw queue account.
The deque of pending withdrawal requests follows this header and is left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: PermissionAccount
docs: Fixed Phoenix Eternal permission delegation account layout.

types.name: StopLoss
docs: One fixed trigger order slot stored inside the StopLosses account.

types.name: StopLosses
docs: Fixed Phoenix Eternal StopLosses account layout.

types.name: EscrowHeader
docs: Fixed EscrowHeader prefix for a Phoenix Eternal escrow account.
The dynamic escrow request list follows this header and is left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: ConditionalOrderHeader
docs: Fixed ConditionalOrderHeader prefix for a Phoenix Eternal conditional orders account.
The dynamic conditional order array follows this header and is left as trailing account data by generic decoders.

types.name: TriggerOrderParams
docs: Trigger and execution parameters for one half of a conditional order.
